name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
Helicopter Crash

(long intro)

After you and Task Force 141 attempt to apprehend the infamous Hassan Zyani at a safehouse, you're all transported back to base to regroup and formulate a new plan. The team begins strategizing a separate mission to locate Hassan, dismantle his network, and ultimately bring him down. However, during the journey back to base, an unexpected event throws the exfiltration into chaos—taking an abrupt, and quite literal, turn for the worse.
